arts.ttl: Former Derby County midfielder retires for 'amazing' opportunity
arts.sum: Former Derby County captain Conor Hourihane has called time on his playing career to take a permanent role as assistant head coach at Barnsley. But he will now assist head coach Darrell Clarke at Oakwell on a full-time basis with Hourihane, who won promotion to the Premier League with Aston Villa, looking forward to the opportunity.
